en.pageTitle: 4-Week Vinyasa Plus YTT — Plan Your July in Copenhagen | YOGA BIBLE
en.metaDesc: Plan your 4-week Vinyasa Plus yoga teacher training in Copenhagen, Denmark. Accommodation, travel, visa, schedule & FAQs for international students. July 2026.
en.heroLocation: Yoga Bible · Torvegade 66, Christianshavn · Copenhagen, Denmark
en.welcomeP1: Every July, yoga teachers from across Europe come to Copenhagen for our most international cohort. You'll train alongside people from Norway, Sweden, Germany, Finland, the Netherlands, the UK — and Denmark. The training is intimate and fully immersive.
en.welcomeP2: Copenhagen in July is magical: long daylight hours, the harbour for swimming, cycling culture, and a city that's easy to navigate even if it's your first visit.
en.vpDesc: Vinyasa Plus is our signature format — designed for teachers who want range.
en.vpFlow: 70% Vinyasa Flow — creative sequencing, class leadership, advanced teaching techniques
en.vpYin: 30% Yin Yoga + Hot Yoga — restoration, deep stretches, teaching in a heated environment
en.vpCert: You graduate certified to teach Vinyasa, Yin, and Hot Yoga — both heated and non-heated classes.
en.vpLink: Read more about the Vinyasa Plus method
en.prepDesc: The Preparation Phase reserves your place in the July cohort and gives you structured preparation before training starts.
en.prepItem1: Reserved spot in the July 2026 cohort
en.prepItem2: Access to preparation materials to study before arrival
en.prepItem3: Personal guidance from your course director
en.prepItem4: Help with accommodation and practicalities in Copenhagen
en.prepItem5: Flexible payment plan for the remaining balance
en.prepRemaining: The remaining balance is settled before training starts — either in full or in instalments. Your course director will be in touch with all the details and next steps.
en.accomDesc: We help international students arrange accommodation. Here are the most common options:
en.accomOpt1Desc: Shared apartments close to the studio in Christianshavn. Typically 670–940 EUR/month. We connect you with current options when you sign up.
en.accomOpt2Desc: We occasionally offer a bundled deal with accommodation arranged for you. Ask us about current availability.
en.accomOpt3Desc: If you prefer to arrange your own stay — Airbnb, hostels, or staying with friends — that works too. Copenhagen is small and bikeable.
en.accomOpt4Desc: If you live in Denmark but outside Copenhagen, the studio is a short commute from Copenhagen Central Station. Many students take the train.
en.accomCta: Have questions about accommodation? Just reply to the email that brought you here, or write to us at
en.cphItem1Desc: Copenhagen is a cycling city. Our studio is centrally located in Christianshavn — easy to reach from anywhere. Most students rent a bike (~15–40 EUR/month) and cycle everywhere. Public transport is excellent too.
en.cphItem2Desc: July means 17+ hours of daylight, harbour swimming 5–10 minutes from the studio, and the beach just 15 minutes away. Expect outdoor dining, street food markets, free concerts, and a relaxed Scandinavian summer pace.
en.cphItem3Desc: Yoga Bible is centrally located in Christianshavn — one of Copenhagen's most charming neighbourhoods. The harbour, cafés, and Christiania are all within walking distance.
en.cphItem4Desc: Budget roughly 800–1,350 EUR/month for food, transport, and essentials. Cooking at home and cycling keeps costs down. Most places accept international cards.
en.exploreBox2Desc: Neighbourhoods, culture, food & things to do
en.exploreBox3Desc: Apartments, shared housing & how we help you settle in
en.travelDesc: Copenhagen Airport (CPH) has direct connections to most European cities. From the airport to the studio is about 20 minutes by metro.
en.travelVisa: EU/EEA citizens need no visa. Non-EU citizens should check Danish visa requirements at nyidanmark.dk. We can provide an enrolment letter for visa applications.
en.timelineItem1Text: Start Preparation Phase to secure your spot
en.timelineItem3Text: Arrive in Copenhagen, settle in, explore the city
en.timelineItem4Text: Training starts at Yoga Bible, Christianshavn
en.timelineItem5Text: Graduation — you're a certified yoga teacher
en.bringItem1: Your own yoga mat (you can store it at the studio between sessions)
en.bringItem2: 2–3 sets of yoga clothes suitable for hot yoga
en.bringItem3: A notebook and/or tablet for journaling and assignments
en.bringItem4: Swimwear — for harbour swimming between sessions
en.bringItem5: An open mind and willingness to grow
en.fellowDesc: The July cohort is our most international group. You'll train with students from across Europe — Norway, Sweden, Germany, Finland, the Netherlands, the UK, and Denmark. Different backgrounds, one shared journey.
en.quoteText: I flew to Copenhagen not knowing anyone. Four weeks later I left with a certification, lifelong friends, and the confidence to teach. Best decision I've made.
en.faq1Q: Do I need to be advanced to join?
en.faq1A: No. All levels are welcome. The Preparation Phase helps you build a strong foundation before training starts.
en.faq2A: You receive your Yoga Alliance RYT-200 certification and can register internationally. Many graduates start teaching within weeks.
en.faq3A: Yes. The Preparation Phase (3,750 DKK) secures your spot. The remaining balance can be paid in instalments before training starts.
en.faq4A: EU/EEA citizens need no visa. For non-EU citizens, a short-stay Schengen visa covers the 4-week training period. We can provide an enrolment letter if needed.
en.faq5Q: Is accommodation included in the price?
en.faq5A: Accommodation is separate from the training fee, but we help you find housing. Most students pay 670–940 EUR/month for shared apartments near the studio.
en.faq6A: Denmark uses Danish Krone (DKK). Most places accept international cards. Approximate conversion: 1 EUR ≈ 7.45 DKK.
en.contactDesc: We're here to help with accommodation, travel, visa — anything you need to plan your July in Copenhagen.
en.scheduleDesc: Here are all 21 training days across 4 weeks — your complete schedule from day one to graduation.
en.greetingText: Here is your personal schedule and planning guide for the 4-week Vinyasa Plus program (July 2026).

en.conflictNone: No conflicts — you can attend every training day!
